---
name: 04-architecture-review
description: Perform a critical architecture review of the current repository.
---

Review the architecture in this repository.

Evaluate the system using the following dimensions.

Architecture Quality

- cohesion of modules
- coupling between components
- clarity of boundaries

Operational Concerns

- scalability
- failure handling
- observability
- deployment safety

Developer Experience

- ease of understanding
- maintainability
- onboarding complexity

Identify:

- strengths
- weaknesses
- unnecessary complexity
- hidden coupling
- refactor opportunities

Provide concrete improvement suggestions with examples.
